location_precision.why: Every finding opens with a usable file:line citation (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Line 31 mechanistically explains a compound failure — adding an ID to `seen` before the UPDATE succeeds, 'compounded by the persistent default at line 24, prevents 100% of subsequent retries for that ID after one failed attempt.'

causal_clarity.why: Each finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. 'Interpolating staged email text into SQL lets a crafted value such as `x' WHERE 1=1 --` update N/N users' rather than merely labeling it SQL injection.
